text_block_list.text:
It's Valentine's Day, and as I head to my office, I
can't help but smile thinking about how anxious
all the Umamusume must be.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Here, this is for you. ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You were on my mind the whole time I was
making 'em.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hope you like how they taste... Go on, try one...
choice_data_list: Is something going to pop out of this box?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoa, whoa—why would you assume that?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You're gonna say that to the racer who just
mustered together all her confidence to give you
this gift?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Seriously, if that's a joke, it's not funny.

Although it was less a joke than a guess based on
my experiences with Seiun Sky... it doesn't look
like she's messing around this time.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yeees, that's what I've been saying.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Geez.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Open it already! And you better give me a nice
reaction when you do!
I carefully open the box Sky gave me, and...
Flop, flop, flop!
A huge fish leaps out right in front of me!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nya-ha-ha! Gotcha. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You were right on the money! ☆ It was a trick all
along!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Man, your face was even better than I imagined...
Hehe, hahaha... ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You're the best, Trainer! You know that? Hahaha!

After that, a cheerful Seiun Sky hands me some
chocolates from the bottom of the joke box.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You know, you can be a bit dull sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if I'll ever get to see you blush or
something.

With all this teasing from her, I find myself
wanting to return the favor.
choice_data_list: You're not really trying, are you?
You're not really trying, are you?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Wha?
choice_data_list:
If you want to see me flustered, you're going to
have to step it up.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What are talking about? Sounds like way
too much work.
choice_data_list:
I guess you can't handle a challenge like that. I
get it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh? You've got some guts egging me on.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Guess I've got no choice! I'll play along. I'm gonna
make your face red as a tomato!

It's evening, and for some reason Sky has
summoned me behind the main hall.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh... you came.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Um... Actually, there's something I wanted to tell
you today.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: The truth is, I... For a long time now, I've...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: This is crazy. There's no way can I do this!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I'd even get anything from seeing you
blush!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So I give up! I'm sorry you won't be able to see my
best try!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Okay... So... Yeah, I'll just leave ya with this.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Those chocolates I gave you... I kinda made them
myself... so you'd better eat them. Or else!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Just kidding! ☆

Staying true to her whimsical nature, Sky hurries
off somewhere.
